title: Rate Limiter

statement.markdown:
## Rate Limiter
Implement a rate limiter that allows a certain number of requests within a time window. The rate limiter should be able to handle multiple clients and allow for burst traffic. Clients should be able to make requests within the allowed rate without being blocked, but should be blocked if the rate is exceeded.

constraints: The rate limiter should be able to handle multiple clients concurrently.
The rate limiter should be able to handle burst traffic.
The rate limiter should block clients if the rate is exceeded.
